# .NET 10 Upgrade Progress — Features Solution

## Overview

Upgrading 7 projects in the Features solution from mixed framework versions (.NET 5/8/9/net48) to .NET 10.0 (LTS). Using a Hybrid strategy: projects grouped by platform type and risk, upgraded group-by-group with validation after each.

**Progress**: 0/6 tasks complete (0%) ![0%](https://progress-bar.xyz/0)

## Tasks

- 🔲 01-avalonia: Upgrade Features.Avalonia
- 🔲 02-shared-projects: Upgrade Shared Projects
- 🔲 03-wpf-dotnetnine: Upgrade Features.NetFive (net9.0-windows → net10.0-windows)
- 🔲 04-wpf-classic: Upgrade Features.WPF (net48 → net10.0-windows)
- 🔲 05-winui3-uwp: Upgrade Features.WinUI3 and Features.UWP
- 🔲 06-final-validation: Full Solution Validation
